provides.distance: at the edge of the sector, several jump-days out

approachTemplates: The ship leaves the trade lanes and dives toward {planetName}, {distance}, under an {climate} sky swept by dust winds.
The crew spots {planetName} on the horizon, an isolated {colonizationLevel} under the watch of {faction}.
aftermathTemplates: Back aboard, the crew watches {planetName} shrink behind them, indifferent and {climate} as ever.
The ship resumes its course, leaving {faction} to deal with the fallout on {planetName}.

provides.distance: within the sector, under permanent cloud cover

approachTemplates: The ship pushes through {planetName}'s electromagnetic canopy, {distance}, an {colonizationLevel} run by {faction}.
The crew descends toward {planetName}, where the {climate} climate already clings to the viewports.
aftermathTemplates: The ship tears free of {planetName}'s {climate} atmosphere, leaving {faction} to close the files.
The crew leaves {planetName}, an {colonizationLevel} already sinking back into its green silence.

provides.distance: at the frozen edge of the sector

approachTemplates: The ship touches down on {planetName}, {distance}, where {faction} barely keeps an {colonizationLevel} running.
The crew zips into thermal suits as they approach {planetName}, {climate} and silent.
aftermathTemplates: The ship lifts off from {planetName}, leaving behind the {climate} cold and {faction}'s patrols.
The crew thaws out as they leave {planetName}, an {colonizationLevel} they hope never to see again.

provides.distance: in low orbit, amid heavy commercial traffic

approachTemplates: The ship merges into {planetName}'s air corridors, {distance}, a {colonizationLevel} under {faction}'s control.
The crew dives toward {planetName}'s lower levels, where the {climate} air smells of metal and advertising.
aftermathTemplates: The ship blends into traffic as it leaves {planetName}, leaving {faction} to deal with the cameras.
The crew pulls away from {planetName}, a {colonizationLevel} that will never notice they were there.

provides.distance: at the edge of the supply routes

approachTemplates: The ship sets down on {planetName}'s platforms, {distance}, a {colonizationLevel} held together by {faction}'s sheer effort.
The crew feels {planetName}'s {climate} air seep into the airlock before it's even fully open.
aftermathTemplates: The ship lifts off from {planetName}'s platforms, leaving {faction} to keep fighting the tides.
The crew leaves {planetName}, a {colonizationLevel} that will survive, once again, one more day.

provides.distance: near the sector's active fault lines

approachTemplates: The ship stabilizes above {planetName}, {distance}, an {colonizationLevel} operated by {faction}.
The crew watches {faction}'s drills scar {planetName}'s {climate} surface.
aftermathTemplates: The ship breaks free of {planetName}'s gravity, leaving {faction} to resume the extraction.
The crew leaves {planetName}, an {colonizationLevel} that will keep smoking long after they're gone.
